title: Senyum di Lintasan
theme: Menemukan kehangatan dan potensi koneksi baru di tengah rutinitas harian melalui sebuah kebaikan kecil yang tak terduga, membuka hati untuk kemungkinan di luar kebiasaan.

cover.prompt: Cinematic photograph of a serene riverside city park at dawn. A tranquil asphalt pathway gently curves along a calm river, illuminated by the soft orange and golden hues of the eastern horizon. Gentle light creates a subtle shimmer on the water's surface, reflecting the luminous sky and the elegant silhouettes of lush trees. A distant, indistinct human silhouette is visible moving along the pathway, completely harmonizing with the peaceful environment. The overall atmosphere is one of routine, calm, and the promise of a bright day. Clean and evocative composition.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Tara, on her monotonous morning run, trips and damages her phone. A photographer, Leo, observes the incident and kindly offers a clean handkerchief to dry her phone and retrieves her fallen sunglasses. This small act of unexpected kindness transforms Tara's frustrating morning into a warm and hopeful encounter, hinting at future possibilities.
meta.target_emotion: warmth, hope, pleasant surprise, comfort, optimism
